item.description: ### Added - **Stats.** A new dashboard (menu-bar gearshape → Stats…, plus a one-line glance in the popover) showing your activity across **both Claude and Codex**: a GitHub-style contribution heatmap, current/longest streaks, active days, total tokens, favorite model, longest session, most-active day, and a per-model breakdown — all with All-time / 30-day / 7-day and Claude / Codex / Both filters. It's computed entirely on your Mac from the sessions you already have; nothing leaves your machine, no sign-in. The first open reads your history once (then it's instant), and your stats also appear on the iPhone and Apple Watch companions.
